title: D365 BC Consultant
description:
What are you looking for?


If it’s a career that offers growth opportunities, an independent work environment, and a dynamic, supportive company with a strong ethical culture - keep reading. If it’s working with a team that has passion for their work, a good sense of fun, and a strong work-ethic – keep reading. If it’s working in a collaborative environment that encourages and supports growth and change – keep reading. If you are an experienced Marketing professional and would like the opportunity to work with one of Microsoft’s largest, Global, multi-award winning partners – keep reading.


Who is sa.global


sa.global is the major global provider of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Operations solutions for professional services firms and other project-driven organizations. Our add-on solution, Projects 360, is used by architecture & engineering firms, IT & management consulting firms, and other project-driven businesses to optimize the performance of their organizations. Our team provides support and consulting services to improve efficiencies and streamline operations in order to enable our clients’ businesses to grow. With an experienced team, we are able to participate in a variety of business models focusing on the implementation of a successful Dynamics 365 solution.


Why work for sa.global


· You will work in an agile work environment that provides you with opportunities to learn, scale-up, and adapt effectively. We are open to new ideas and look at sharing knowledge and best practices across the organization.

· You will be working with a highly experienced, collaborative, supportive, and fun team.

· You will work for one of the leading global Dynamics 365 providers. Microsoft has named sa.global their Microsoft Dynamics Professional Services Industry Partner of the Year.

· We are on the forefront of new technologies. We were one of the early adopters to Dynamics 365 F&O for internal use.

· You will be part of one of the largest resource pools of any global Microsoft Dynamics 365 partner – bringing local expertise combined with global reach.


Why we need you


We are passionate about technology and Microsoft business applications. We are currently looking for a Functional Consultant – D365 Business Central (Dynamics NAV) to join our ERP team. Reporting to the Country Manager, the objective of this role is to take a consultative approach to implement and deliver D365 Business Central (Dynamics NAV)/D365 products and services.


Responsibility areas


· Hands-on implementation and deployment of D365 Business Central (Dynamics NAV) and Project Management, D365 solution architect and consulting services to customers.

· Working collaboratively with customer stakeholders to implement and leverage D365 Business Central (Dynamics NAV) using best development and implementation methodologies.

· Provide onsite and offsite consulting services.

· Proactively identify, analyse, and respond to issues and risks.

· Foster teamwork, mentor, and train consultants on best practices, project methodology, and professional client service.

· Suggest areas of improvement in methodology and internal processes along with potential solutions.

· Recognize and pursue opportunities for cross-selling and additional client projects.

· Participate in pre-sales activities.

· Design project schedules and set timelines for each member of the team and delegate specific tasks to each resource of the project.

· Liaise with product vendors on any issues relevant for our customers or the company’s services.

· End to End management co-ordination of the project and responsible for the successful completion of the project within a stipulated budget.

· Report to Systems Advisers Pte Ltd Services Management, attend or conduct Project Steering committee, and conduct project status meetings

· Ensure that the technical aspects of projects meet required standards for functionality, operability and documentation

· Ensure timesheets are entered and processed accurately and responsible for invoicing in relation to projects.

· Work with project managers and team leaders to cater for resource changes across projects.

· Ongoing commitment to continuous professional development; completing relevant certifications in a timely manner when necessary.

· Represent the business professionally and positively at all times.


Essential Criteria


· 3 years’ experience in D365 Business Central (Dynamics NAV) software implementations.

· 3 years’ experience in Project Management, preferably with ERP solutioning, with a demonstrated exposure in managing complex combined business and IT projects to strict delivery schedules.

· Strong understanding and application of Project Management competencies including: Scope, time, costs, quality, HR, communications, risk, procurements, and integration.

· Strong understanding of industry-standard business practices supported by D365 Business Central.

· Experience leading large complex technology projects.

· Business intelligence understanding including Reporting and Analytics.

· Possess a deep understanding of software implementation lifecycles, development methodologies, operating systems, technical platforms/architecture, and application servers.


Who we are a looking for:


· Highly confident with providing support and training to users

· Attention to detail and a keen desire to deliver the highest quality solutions to customers

· Experience across a number of industries

· Complex problem solver with creative solutions

· Self-Starter with ability to handle multiple tasks and shifting priorities

· Thinks clearly and calmly under pressure

· Places emphasis on client satisfaction

· Business analysis

· Client facing skills


Education:


· Minimum Bachelor’s degree, preferably in Information technology or equivalent professional qualification.

· Relevant Microsoft certifications are preferable.

· Project Management certification is highly desirable

Ideal candidate is someone seeking to work in an environment with independence, personal growth opportunities, strong client-centric values and a supportive group of colleagues.

postedCompany.description:
SAGLOBAL SOUTH EAST ASIA

Headquartered in Hong Kong and with Centers of Excellence in North America, Europe, Africa, Asia Pacific and Latin America. SAGlobal provides solutions and services around Microsoft's AX ERP solution. We have one of the largest resource pools of any global Microsoft Dynamics AX partner - bringing you local expertise combined with global reach.

Our Expertise Lets You Focus on What You Do Best - Serve Your Client

Our strength lies in our ability to help our clients improce the financial performance and execution of their projects by configuring our software system to meet each firm's unique business requirements. This ehlps them to achieve tangible improvements in their business operations and realize a positive return on their technology investment.

Our consultants include mostly senior-level professionals that have extensive business and technology experience. We're considered by our peers to be the most senior-level team in the Dynamics AX business.

Our credentials include:

  • An average of 19 years of professional experience
  • An average of over 10 years of ERP software consulting experience
  • An average of over 8 years working with Microsoft Dynamics AX
  • Many consultants that have been working with Microsoft Dynamics AX since V1.0
postedCompany.name: SYSTEMS ADVISERS PTE. LTD.
